label: DeFi Atomic Bundles
description: DeFi-specific atomic bundle builder with Flash Loan Arb and Leverage Long pre-built templates.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore (string 'any' in UI text is not a type).

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file; DEFI_TEMPLATES from lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config.

0.6.note: — widget uses local DefiOp[] state (no async fetch); template selection is the pre-data state.

0.7.note: Empty state present: pre-template state (showTemplates+empty ops), and ops.length===0+!showTemplates guard.

0.8.note: — no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers render errors.

0.9.note: No dead code. Fixed: now imports useBundlesData() for readOnly flag; readOnly wired to disable Add Operation, Clear all, Simulate on Tenderly, Execute Bundle buttons in batch mode.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[bundles]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore (string 'any' in UI text is not a type). 0.5 No mock imports in widget file; DEFI_TEMPLATES from lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config. 0.6 N/A — widget uses local DefiOp[] state (no async fetch); template selection is the pre-data state. 0.7 Empty state present: pre-template state (showTemplates+empty ops), and ops.length===0+!showTemplates guard. 0.8 N/A — no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary covers render errors. 0.9 No dead code. Fixed: now imports useBundlesData() for readOnly flag; readOnly wired to disable Add Operation, Clear all, Simulate on Tenderly, Execute Bundle buttons in batch mode.

1.1.note: — widget manages its own DefiOp[] local state rather than reading from a domain data context hook. This is intentional: DefiOp is a different data model from BundleStep (used by the other 4 bundles widgets). No defi-atomic-specific data context exists. readOnly flag now sourced from useBundlesData(). Recommend creating a DefiAtomicBundlesDataContext in a follow-up task to fully satisfy 1.1. 1.2-1.6 N/A at widget level — the widget's operations are user-authored local state. Scope filtering applies to readOnly (batch mode) which is now wired.

1.2.note: 1.6 N/A at widget level — the widget's operations are user-authored local state. Scope filtering applies to readOnly (batch mode) which is now wired.

1.6.note: at widget level — the widget's operations are user-authored local state. Scope filtering applies to readOnly (batch mode) which is now wired.

1.7.note: All reference data (DEFI_OPERATIONS, DEFI_TOKENS, DEFI_TEMPLATES, GAS_ESTIMATES, gasToUsd) in lib/config/services/defi-bundles.config — correct location.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

l4.notes: Known L4 issues: Simulate on Tenderly and Execute Bundle buttons have no onClick handlers — dead buttons. Needs wiring in L4.

gaps.notes: CARRY_STAKED_BASIS §7 DeFi (Ethereum)/staking + lending + perp: ATOMIC 3-leg instruction; bridge path for cross-chain perp
CARRY_RECURSIVE_STAKED §8 DeFi (Ethereum)/staking + lending (recursive): Liquidation-cascade risk declared; per-protocol bonus schedule gap in UAC
ARBITRAGE_PRICE_DISPERSION §11 DeFi/lp: Flash-loan receiver contract per-chain registry missing from UAC; deployed on testnet only on some chains
LIQUIDATION_CAPTURE §12 DeFi (Ethereum)/lending: Flash-loan receiver contract deployed on Ethereum; per-protocol bonus schedule gap in UAC

Execute Bundle button has no onClick handler — dead button (L4 scope)
